mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( sns_id, sns, role, status ) VALUES ( #{snsId}, #{sns}, #{role}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, birth_year = #{birthYear}, address = #{address}, tos = #{tos}, privacy_policy = #{privacyPolicy}, role = #{role}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND sns_id = #{snsId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( sns_id, sns, nickname, tos, privacy_policy, agree_at, role, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{snsId}, #{sns}, #{nickname}, #{tos}, #{privacyPolicy}, #{agreeAt}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, sns_id, sns, nickname, tos, privacy_policy, agree_at, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM member WHERE id = #{memberId}

SELECT id, sns_id, sns, nickname, gender, address, tos, privacy_policy, third_party_policy, location_policy, role, status, profile_image_id, birth_year, agree_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM member WHERE sns_id = #{snsId}
